caption: The video appears to be concluding with a slide that reads "Thank you" in the center, indicating the end of a presentation or lecture. The slide is simple, with a light purple background and the text in a dark blue font. In the bottom right corner, there is a small inset video showing a person, likely the presenter, who seems to be addressing the audience. The presenter is wearing a patterned top and a pink scarf, and they appear to be speaking or gesturing as if wrapping up their talk. The logo and name of the institution, "Walchand Institute of Technology, Solapur," are displayed in the bottom left corner, suggesting that this presentation is part of an academic or educational event. The overall tone of the video suggests a formal and professional setting.
